subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto him who hath turned towards God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, that the fragrances of remembrance and utterance may draw him near [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم لمن اقبل الی الله المهیمن القیوم لتجذبه نفحات الذکر و البیان
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @call to action
